issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, focusing mainly on happy paths.

scenarios.name: Restrict authors to editing their own posts and only admins to deleting
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defined operation.delete with hasRole('admin'), filter.query/update returning Prisma-style where clauses keyed on session.itemId, and an item.update check — exactly the three-layer model (operation/filter/item) the skill teaches; baseline wrote a single resolver guard and didn't use filter access to hide non-owned posts from list queries.

scenarios.name: Revalidate the Next.js frontend when a post transitions to published
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used afterOperation.update comparing originalItem.status to item.status and POSTed to FRONTEND_URL/api/revalidate, plus a validateInput hook to block publishing empty content; baseline put the revalidation call in a custom GraphQL mutation, missing the lifecycle-hook pattern and the validation gate.
